metadata.description: Kinetic constants for 18 human hepatocyte metabolic enzymes
metadata.fields: kcat_per_s, km_M (Michaelis constant or S0.5 for cooperative enzymes, in Molar), hill, cosubstrate_km_M (Molar), organism, estimateQuality, source

estimateQuality_levels.measured: human enzyme, directly measured kcat and Km
estimateQuality_levels.partial: human Km measured; reliable kcat unavailable
estimateQuality_levels.mammalian-proxy: best value from non-human mammal or sparse/mixed data

metadata.sources: SABIO-RK (h-its.org) wildtype entries filtered to pH 6.5-8.5 where available; primary literature via PubMed; BRENDA cross-check
metadata._provenance: Produced by the user's Claude Science research pass. Persisted verbatim as source-of-record. Folded into engine kinetics + expression-coupled urea cycle.

enzymes.source: Matschinsky et al., Front Physiol 2019 (PMC6435959); Molnes et al., FEBS J 2008
enzymes.note: S0.5(glucose)~8 mM sigmoidal (nH~1.7); Km(Mg2+-ATP)~0.4 mM; monomeric; kcat 48-63/s.

enzymes.source: Webb et al., Biochem J 2020;477(22) BCJ20200656 (PMC7702303)
enzymes.note: Recombinant human PFK-L; cooperative in F6P (Hill 3.10); kcat 5.4/s (F6P-varied) vs 57/s (ATP-varied).
Human L/R-PK; allosteric, activated by fructose-1,6-bisphosphate; spread reflects +/- FBP.
Human aldolase B; low kcat(~0.6/s) toward F1,6BP characteristic of B isozyme (optimized for fructose-1-phosphate).

enzymes.organism: mouse (purified); human microsomes for higher Km
enzymes.source: Newby et al., J Biol Chem 2021;297:101520 (PMC8753184)
enzymes.note: ER-membrane phosphohydrolase; purified mG6PC1 Km 0.43 mM kcat 41/s; crude microsomes Km 2-3 mM.

enzymes.source: Escos et al., Biochem Biophys Rep 2016;7:124 (PMC5613351)
enzymes.note: Measured on human mitochondrial PCK2; cytosolic PCK1 similar. Requires Mn2+/Mg2+. OAA Km 8.7uM, GTP Km 29uM.
Human liver FBPase-1; Km 1.7uM, kcat 22/s; AMP-inhibited; homotetramer.
Human liver glycogen synthase; Km(UDP-glucose)~0.75mM; no reliable kcat -> unknown. G6P-activated.
Human liver glycogen phosphorylase; Km(glycogen) a-form 2.7mM; no kcat reported (activity as V). b-form AMP-activated.
Human CPS1 (mitochondrial); Km(ammonia)~1.2mM; ATP Km~0.5mM; requires NAG activator; kcat~4.5/s.
Recombinant human OTC (WT); Km(ornithine) 0.48mM, Km(carbamoyl-P) 0.21mM, kcat 34/s; mitochondrial matrix.

enzymes.source: SABIO-RK PMID 2791302,518841 (kcat from Vmax x subunit MW 46.5kDa)
enzymes.note: Human ASS1; Km(citrulline)~65uM; aspartate/ATP Km~60uM; kcat~3.3/s; cytosolic.

enzymes.source: SABIO-RK PMID 11092456,2085183,6784763 (kcat from Vmax x subunit MW 51.7kDa)
enzymes.note: Human ASL; Km(argininosuccinate)~0.2mM; kcat~6.9/s; homotetramer; cytosolic.
Human arginase 1 (cytosolic, liver); high kcat~200/s; Km(arginine)~2-5mM; Mn2+-dependent; homotrimer.
Human mitochondrial HMG-CoA synthase (ketogenesis, rate-limiting); Km(acetoacetyl-CoA)~1uM; no reliable human kcat -> unknown.
Human HMG-CoA lyase; Km(HMG-CoA)~48uM; kcat~108/s; divalent-cation dependent.
Human ACC1 (cytosolic, lipogenesis); Km(acetyl-CoA)~46uM; kcat~11/s; biotin-dependent; citrate-activated, AMPK-inhibited.
Human CPT1A (outer mito membrane, rate-limiting FAO); Km(palmitoyl-CoA)~73uM; L-carnitine Km~0.48mM; no reliable kcat (membrane Vmax) -> unknown; malonyl-CoA inhibited.
